TableTask1v2.summary: Pick 16 shuffled colored cubes from bin → place in 4x4 color-striped grid (cortex BT, color matching)

TableTask2v2.summary: Pick 7 cubes from dropzone line → place on 12 blue cubes in 3x4 grid (cortex BT, sequential)

TableTask3Curobo.summary: Pick 9 balls from bin → place on disc targets in 3x4 grid (cuRobo plan-and-stream BT)

TableTask3b2.summary: Pick 12 balls from bin → place into tight gaps between disc targets in 3x4 grid (cortex BT)

TableTask3c2.summary: Pick balls from bin → place in gaps, then pick red balls from cart → place in remaining gaps (cortex BT)

other_task_features: two-phase: bin balls into disc gaps, then cart balls into remaining gaps

TableTask3v2.summary: Pick 9 balls from bin → place on disc targets in 3x4 grid (cortex BT, sequential)

TableTask4v2.summary: Pick 9 cubes from bin → place on yellow rectangles in circle (cortex BT)

TableTask5v2.summary: Pick 6 green cubes from dropzone grid → place on red rectangles in circle (cortex BT)

TableTaskBottles2.summary: Pick 9 bottles from bin → place into carrier pads in 3x4 grid (cortex BT, BottlePickStrategy)

TableTaskBottlesToConveyor2.summary: Pick 10 from 16 bottles in 2-layer bin → place into row of pads on conveyor with JIT selection & replenishment (cortex BT, DynamicTopPickStrategy)

other_task_features: DynamicTopPickStrategy: JIT top-Z selection for picks

TableTaskBottlesToConveyor2x.summary: Pick bottles from 2-layer bin → place on conveyor pads (cortex BT with FK-anchored LowerToPlace descent experiment)

other_task_features: LowerToPlaceFromFKBehaviour descent variant (FK-anchored instead of RmpFlow)

TableTaskCartToConveyor2.summary: Pick 4 mixed items from cart → place vertically into 4 boxes on conveyor (cortex BT, sequential)

TableTaskColorBinSort2.summary: Pick 1-5 items from conveyor → sort to color-matching bins (cortex BT, ColorMatchStrategy)

TableTaskColorCircle2.summary: Pick 9 colored cubes from bin → place on white markers in circle (cortex BT, sequential)

TableTaskColorShapes2.summary: Pick 20 mixed shapes from conveyor → sort to color-matching boxes (cortex BT, ColorMatchStrategy)

TableTaskColors2.summary: Pick colored cubes from bin → place on matching colored cube targets in grid (cortex BT, ColorMatchStrategy)

TableTaskConveyorColorStacks2.summary: Pick 15 colored cubes from conveyor → stack in bin as color triplets with layer placement (cortex BT, ColorStackStrategy)

other_task_features: color triplets: blue bottom, green middle, red top

TableTaskConveyorSort2.summary: Pick 20 cubes and balls from conveyor → sort to shape-matching boxes on cart (cortex BT, TypeBasedStrategy)

TableTaskConveyorTypeSort2.summary: Pick 1-5 items from moving conveyor → sort to type-matching cart boxes (cortex BT, tightened approach)

TableTaskCrackerBoxes2.summary: Pick 12 cracker boxes from bin → place on green rectangles in 3x4 grid (cortex BT)

TableTaskCrackerCircle2.summary: Pick 18 cracker boxes from 2-layer circle → stack into bin column (cortex BT, SingleStackStrategy, tightened hover)

TableTaskIncrementalTargets2.summary: Pick 12 cubes from bin with incremental spawn → place on incrementally-spawned purple disc markers (cortex BT)

TableTaskLayeredCircle2.summary: Pick 14 sugar boxes from 2-layer circle → stack into bin column (cortex BT, SingleStackStrategy)

TableTaskLayeredCubes2.summary: Unstack 18 cubes from 3-layer bin → place on flat white marker grid on dropzone (cortex BT, stacking constraints)

TableTaskMixedCircle2.summary: Pick 20 mixed primitives and USD assets from circle on conveyor → place in bin on cart (cortex BT)

TableTaskMixedPacking2.summary: Pick 1 cracker + 4 soup cans from conveyor → pack into 2 boxes on cart (cortex BT, raised EE height)

TableTaskShapeSortBoxes2.summary: Pick 20 cubes and balls from conveyor → sort to shape-matching boxes on cart (cortex BT, TypeBasedStrategy)

TableTaskSortAndStack2.summary: Pick 90 cubes from 3-layer 6x5 stack → sort by color to cart boxes or dropzone stacks (cortex BT, ColorStackStrategy)

other_task_features: color sorting + stacking: red/green/blue to cart boxes, yellow to dropzone stacks

TableTaskSoupCanPacking2.summary: Pick 24 soup cans from conveyor → pack 6 into each of 4 boxes on cart (cortex BT, sequential)

TableTaskSoupCans2.summary: Pick 9 soup cans from bin → place onto dynamic red rectangles in bursts on moving conveyor (cortex BT, ConveyorProximityStrategy, custom BurstRectTargetGenerator)
